ddt:Target.Name: INVA_ME_6AM_UDS_V1.1
ddt:Target.Description:
01/04/2022 INVA_ME_6AM_UDS_V1.1[SMA] -Updated and Mapped Screens to already coded DIDs ->Identification information And Sensor I-O(No modification dne in Maintaibility report ) -No New DID /DTC Updated or Modified
INVA_ME_6AM_UDS_V1.0[ARJ] Updated the DID List as per the Spec - Copie de REF17_Diagnostic_ressources_file_v6.0_4 Added Auto ident copied from Database - N_BCB_PEB_UDS_PT_20201207_renamed NO DTC and I/O Cntrol Updation Recommended.
[3]Sep 23rd, 2021 Nissan XX6 Changed data type from Numeric to NotNumeric regarding DID$7037 and $703B.
[2]Sep 21th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Added WS requests.
[1]Sep 13th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Added FFD items.
[N]Jul 19th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev13.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: ($100F) Raw rotor position resolver angular position measurement
($1012) Final SPT d axis current request
($1013) Final SPT q axis current request
($1027) Wake up sleep command from HEVC
($715D)Listen only mode activation by FPGA due to "Deactivation status zero torque" cano information monitoring
($715E)SPI copy for FPGa of DeactivationStatus sent on CAN

Item.Text: Nsx_hevc_dact_volt_avl - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(01h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_ztq - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(02h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_imd_off - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / immediate shut-off(03h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_uv - Deactivation Request Reserved for safety(0fh)

Data.Name: ($7165)Oil Pump flow set point consolidated with NVH limitation
($716C)Estimated oil temperature of heating exchange output
($727C)Fault signal from excitation module Hi-side gate driver
($727D)Fault signal from excitation module Lo-side gate driver
($7280)Fault signal for drive PWM on upper
($7281)Fault signal for drive PWM on lower
($7282)Excitation module ready signal for low and high sides of driver
($7285)Status flag default of SPI link from smartcoder to micro

Item.Text: Phase error exceeds phase lock range (D1h)
Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS mismatch threshold (D4h)
Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS overrange threshold (D5h)

Data.Name: ($727A)If HS curret sensor offset value
Data.Comment: If HS curret sensor offset value1

Data.Name: ($727B)If LS curret sensor offset value
Data.Comment: If LS curret sensor offset value1

Data.Name: ($7288) Wake up sleep command from HEVC
($7136)Final value (after filtering) of Emotor torque estimation, based on measured current values

Item.Text: Nsx_auto_diag_apc_off - Auto diag without apc allowed
Nsx_auto_diag_apc_on - Auto diag with apc allowed
Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_wait - auto diag basic software waiting
Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_tout - auto diag basic software time out
Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"(04h)
Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"(05h)
Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(06h)
Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(07h)
Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(08h)
Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"(09h)
Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ah)
Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"(0bh)
Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ch)
Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage(0dh)
Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)(0eh)

Data.Name: ($7141)Combination of rotor and stator temperatures, so in %
($7142)The water temperature produced by the Rectifier

Item.Text: Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
1 Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0bh)
Nsx_gc_md_03 - GC-MD03 : minor failure whithout impact on traction
Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0bh)

Data.Name: ($7147)Validity status of the rotor electrical angular position

Item.Text: Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail: Failure of the functional position acquisition(01h)
Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail_sfty: Failure of the safety position acquisition(02h)
Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_full_fail: Double failure or incoherency between functional and safety positions(03h)

Data.Name: ($7148)Combinated current value on the HV Network of Inverter and Excitation
($714E)Context data 1 for DTC_Reset : 16bits SeedBreaker called on reset request

Item.Text: Nsx_hv_nok - More than one sensor failure
Nsx_hv_ok - HV voltage comparison OK, No failure
Nsx_hv_udc_dfl - HV UDC voltage sensor failure
Nsx_hv_nw_loss - HV Network Loss or false relay status information
Nsx_hv_bat_sfty_dfl - HV battery safety mode 1 request (safety flag)
Nsx_hv_rly_open_dfl - false open relay status information

Data.Name: ($714F)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[12] = max duration of 100µs task, coded on 32 bits
($7150)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[3] = max duration of 10ms task, coded on 32 bits

Item.Text: tracebility variable (Detail dans le fichier TracabiliteExecutionPourINV600.doc )

Data.Name: ($7153)Stator current information stored in non erasable memory
($7157)Inverter temperature sensor 1 stored in non erasable memory
($7155)Rotor temperature estimation stored in non erasable memory
($705F)1s average pcb temperature on break event for post mortem
($708C)Raw rotor position resolver excitation peak voltage
($7091)Last driver board temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem

Item.Text: Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_ both currents are out of range OR the 2 currents are inconsistent (difference > thershold)(01h)
Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_2 : current from sensor 1 (Vxx_i_f_1) is out of range(02h)
Nsx_i_f_chk_dfl_ current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_f_2) is out of range(03h)
Nsx_no_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl : the summ of the 3 currents is close to zero (< threshold)(00h)
Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_ the summ of the 3 currents isn't close to zero (>threshold) OR at least 2 of the currents are out of range(01h)
Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_2 : current from sensor 1 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_1) is out of range(02h)
Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_ current from sensor 2 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_2) is out of range(03h)
Nsx_i_mot_ph_chk_dfl_4 : current from sensor 3 (Vxx_i_mot_ph_3) is out of range(04h)

Data.Name: ($709E)Context data 1 for DTC_Reset : 16bits SeedBreaker called on reset request
($709F)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[12] = max duration of 100µs task, coded on 32 bits
($70A1)Vtx_TaskMaxDurationIT_A[3] = max duration of 10ms task, coded on 32 bits
($7101)result of the check on CAN communication with (H)EVC (RN2 or RN3 frame CLK + CRC + CAN confirmed absent)
($7103)Inverter high arm IGBT driver memorized fault
($7104)Inverter low arm IGBT driver memorized fault
($7105)Rotor electrical rotation speed safety failure flag

Item.Text: No reliable position information to compute rotor speed or incoherency between functional and safety rotation speeds(01h)

Data.Name: ($7107)Stator current information stored in non erasable memory
($7108)Status flag of the SPI link to the Smartcoder
($710A)Rotor temperature estimation stored in non erasable memory
($710D)Inverter temperature sensor 1 stored in non erasable memory

Item.Text: Nsx_hevc_dact_volt_avl - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(01h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_ztq - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(02h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_imd_off - Deactivation Request Torque interruption request / immediate shut-off(03h)
Nsx_hevc_dact_uv - Deactivation Request Reserved for safety(0fh)

Data.Name: ($7115)SPI copy for FPGa of DeactivationStatus sent on CAN
($7118)Status flag default of SPI link from smartcoder to micro : To be adapted to new smartcoder

Item.Text: TPhase error exceeds phase lock range(d1h)
Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS mismatch threshold(d4h)
Sine/cosine inputs exceed DOS overrange threshold(d5h)

Data.Name: ($7116)Listen only mode activation by FPGA due to "Deactivation status motor stop" cano information monitoring
($7117)Listen only mode activation by FPGA due to "Deactivation status zero torque" cano information monitoring
($7119)Number of the bloc which has nvrol error
($711A)Vehicle speed CAN information received form HEVC
($711D)Reslover offset value01(To confirm the value of memory)
($711E)Reslover offset value02(To confirm the value of memory)
($711F)Reslover offset value03(To confirm the value of memory)
($7120)Reslover offset value CRC1(To confirm the value of memory)
($7121)Reslover offset value CRC2(To confirm the value of memory)
($7122)Reslover offset value CRC3(To confirm the value of memory)
($7123)Rotor resistance value01(To confirm the value of memory)
($7124)Rotor resistance value02(To confirm the value of memory)
($7125)Rotor resistance value03(To confirm the value of memory)
($7126)Rotor resistance value CRC1(To confirm the value of memory)
($7127)Rotor resistance value CRC2(To confirm the value of memory)
($7128)Rotor resistance value CRC3(To confirm the value of memory)
($2070)Data indicating that the Immobilizer diagnosis is available
($2074)Data indicating that the Immobilizer forbids engine working due to the ECU
($2075)Data indicating that the Immobilizer forbids engine working due to BCM secure mode
($2076)Data indicating that the Immobilizer forbids engine working due to no authorization from BCM
($2077)Data indicating that the Immobilizer forbids engine working due to a CAN default with the BCM
($7011)Raw rotor position resolver angular position measurement
($7014)Raw rotor position resolver cosine voltage with 25µs delay
($7015)Raw rotor position resolver excitation peak voltage
($701C)Saved reslover position offset learning + CRC written by diag tool
($7021)Saved resistance rotor learning + CRC written by diag tool
($7022)Active discharge request from EVC to PEB

Item.Text: Nsx_auto_diag_apc_off - Auto diag without apc allowed(01h)
Nsx_auto_diag_apc_on - Auto diag with apc allowed(02h)
Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_wait - auto diag basic software waiting(05h)
Nsx_auto_diag_bsw_tout - auto diag basic software time out(06h)
Nsx_dcdc_stt_def_mod_4_stby - Defaut MD4 while on standby(06h)
Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(03h)
Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"(04h)
Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"(05h)
Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(06h)
Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"(07h)
Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(08h)
Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"(09h)
Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ah)
Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"(0bh)
Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"(0ch)
Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage(0dh)
Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)(0eh)

Data.Name: ($7035)Maximal available calculated torque in generator mode

Item.Text: Nsx_hv_nok - More than one sensor failure(00h)
Nsx_hv_ok - HV voltage comparison OK, No failure(01h)
Nsx_hv_udc_dfl - HV UDC voltage sensor failure(02h)
Nsx_hv_nw_loss - HV Network Loss or false relay status information(05h)
Nsx_hv_bat_sfty_dfl - HV battery safety mode 1 request (safety flag)(06h)
Nsx_hv_rly_open_dfl - false open relay status information(08h)

Data.Name: ($7036)Maximal available calculated torque in motor mode
($7037)Reslover position offset learning + CRC written by diag tool
($703A)Combination of rotor and stator temperatures, so in %
($703B)Resistance rotor learning + CRC written by diag tool
($703D)The water temperature produced by the Rectifier

Item.Text: Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0bh)
Nsx_gc_md_03 - GC-MD0 minor failure whithout impact on traction(01h)
Nsx_gc_md_01d - GC-MD01d : Active short circuit on low arms(07h)
Nsx_gc_md_01e - GC-MD01e : Active short circuit on high arms(08h)
Nsx_dfl_chr_md - inconsistency between PWMs and downgraded mode (0bh)

Data.Name: ($7048)Validity status of the rotor electrical angular position

Item.Text: Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail: Failure of the functional position acquisition(01h)
Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_fail_sfty: Failure of the safety position acquisition(02h)
Nsx_dgt_emot_psn_chk_full_fail: Double failure or incoherency between functional and safety positions(03h)

Data.Name: ($704F)Saved CRC value of rotor position offset
($7050)Value for reference rotor resistance (for safety monitoring)
($7059)1s average driver board temperature on break event for post mortem
($705C)Water overheat temperature counter for post mortem
($7053)Vector of 5 average driver board temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem
($7039)Combination of inverter,Excitation, PCB, MC and DRI temperatures, so in %
($705D)1s average excitation temperature on break event for post mortem
($705E)1s average inverter temperature on break event for post mortem
($7061)Maximum driver board temperature during last derating
($7066)Charge or non zero torque time counter for post mortem analysis
($7067)APC and zero torque time counter for post mortem analysis
($7068)Software overcurrent protection counter for post mortem analysis
($7069)Hardware (by the fpga) overcurrent protection counter for post mortem analysis
($706A)Hardware (by the fpga) overvoltage protection counter for post mortem analysis
($706B)Software overvoltage protection counter for post mortem analysis

Item.Text: Nsx_byp_tq_mod - TQ setpoint and torque mode bypass(03h)
Nsx_byp_volt_invt_i_exct_psn - Inverter voltage control +excitation current +position/speed bypass(07h)
Nsx_byp_rgl_dyc - RGL duty cycle bypass (in PWM)(08h)
Nsx_byp_volt_emul_psn - Voltage control and speed bypass and position emulation(09h)
Nsx_byp_i_req_emul_psn - Current request and speed bypass and position emulation(0ah)
Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC(00h)
Torque interruption request / voltage mode allowed(03h)
Torque interruption request / zero-torque regulation all(05h)
Vehicle unprotected by VERLOG or by RES(01h)

Data.Name: ($7057)Vector of 5 average wtr temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem
($7056)Vector of 5 average pcb temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem
($7055)Vector of 5 average inverter temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem
($7054)Vector of 5 average excitation temperature on 1s in the minute before break event for post mortem
($2002)Final value (after filtering) of Emotor torque estimation, based on measured current values
($7140)Combination of inverter, Excitation, PCB, MC and DRI temperatures, so in %
($715A)First interlock state according to the table below
($715B)Second interlock state according to the table below

Request.Name: DataRead.($2071)Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosis
DataRead.($2072)Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosis
DataRead.($2073)Byte used to allow Immobiliser diagnosis
DataRead.($715A)First interlock state according to the table below

DataItem.Name: ($715A)First interlock state according to the table below

Request.Name: DataRead.($715B)Second interlock state according to the table below

DataItem.Name: ($715B)Second interlock state according to the table below

Label.Text: if value=1 then the engine isn't running due to ECM
if value=1 then the engine isn't running due to no BCM autorisation
if value=1 then the Immobilizer forbids engine working due to a CAN default with the BCM
if value=1 then the engine isn't running due to BCM secure mode
if value>60V then reprogramming is not possible
if (value>50rpm OR value<-50) then reprogramming is not possible

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.($7037)Reslover position offset learning + CRC written by diag tool
